hints.text: **Black car, no antenna, no red brake light** — the only Middle Eastern country covered by this car
Plates white (long or short); commercial/taxis have a **green strip on the left** (only Jordan in the ME; Israel = yellow plates)
**Arabic**; unlike the UAE, **little English** on commercial signs (a good UAE-vs-Jordan tell)
Roads: **yellow outer, white middle** lines; chevrons **white w/ red arrows** (Israel = black w/ white arrows)
Electricity poles: rounded concrete w/ a diagonal support or **three horizontal 'Y' tops**; thin metal poles w/ 3 vertical coils
Very **arid** — lots of lifeless desert; even the lushest parts look like arid Mediterranean
Buildings mostly **bright sandstone brick w/ flat roofs**; roads often warped/cracked (worse than Israel)
Coverage only in the **far west** (Amman = big-city; ends N of Jerash; south reaches Aqaba); **Madaba = red soil**; highways 15/35/40/65/80 each distinct
